title: Remove mute option — music plays on by default with no pause/mute capability

requirements.text: In AppContext.tsx, remove all pause/mute logic from the music implementation. The background audio at '/assets/music/background.mp3' must start playing immediately on mount (autoplay attempt), set loop = true, set volume = 1.0. Remove the isMusicPlaying state and toggleMusic handler entirely — there is no longer a play/pause toggle. The audio simply plays on loop for the entire session. If autoplay is blocked by the browser, silently retry on the first user interaction (click/keydown on the document) using a one-time event listener. Wrap all audio operations in try/catch that fail silently. The app must never crash regardless of whether the file exists or playback is blocked.

quotes: keep the music button on by default dont keep mute option only let the music play do the changes final call im getting irritated

acceptanceCriteria: Background music begins playing automatically when the app loads without any user interaction.
There is no isMusicPlaying state or toggleMusic function in AppContext.tsx.
Audio is set to loop = true and volume = 1.0.
If autoplay is blocked, a one-time document interaction listener retries audio.play() silently.
All audio operations are wrapped in try/catch that fail silently — the app never crashes.

requirements.text: In AppShell.tsx, remove the music toggle button entirely. Since music now plays unconditionally with no mute option, there is no longer a music control UI element needed. Remove any references to isMusicPlaying, toggleMusic, or the music button JSX from AppShell.tsx. Do not change the dark mode toggle or any other part of AppShell.

quotes: dont keep mute option only let the music play

acceptanceCriteria: The music toggle button is no longer rendered anywhere in AppShell.tsx.
No references to isMusicPlaying or toggleMusic remain in AppShell.tsx.
The dark mode toggle and all other AppShell UI elements remain unchanged.
No TypeScript errors result from removing the music button references.

constraints: Do not change the dark mode toggle or any other AppShell UI elements.
Do not change any page components, quiz logic, navigation, or animations.
All audio error handling must remain silent — app must never crash due to audio.
nonGoals: Adding any new music controls or volume sliders.
Changing the music source file path.
Modifying any page content, styling, or navigation logic.
